title: ARGOS A-DCS
short description: Some polar weather satellites from the METOP and POES series carry ARGOS A-DCS (Advanced Data Collection System), which is a system to collect data from sondes and other remote land or air-based instrumentation.
description: Some weather satellites from the METOP and POES series carry **ARGOS A-DCS** ( Advanced Data Collection System) which is a system to collect data from sondes and other remote land or air based instrumentation.
